name: IdsEdwMbrMedAlertIExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH NormalRows AS ( SELECT M.MBR_MED_ALERT_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK')) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') END AS SRC_SYS_CD, M.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, M.PRCS_YR_MO_SK, M.MED_ALERT_ID, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, M.MED_ALERT_SK, M.MBR_MED_MESRS_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR_MED_ALERT M LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON M.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE (M.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle} OR M.MBR_MED_ALERT_SK IN (0,1)) AND M.MBR_MED_ALERT_SK NOT IN (0,1) ), UNK AS ( SELECT 0 AS MBR_MED_ALERT_SK, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 0 AS MBR_UNIQ_KEY, '175301' AS PRCS_YR_MO_SK, 'UNK' AS MED_ALERT_ID, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS MED_ALERT_SK, 0 AS MBR_MED_MESRS_SK, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK ), NA_ AS ( SELECT 1 AS MBR_MED_ALERT_SK, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 1 AS MBR_UNIQ_KEY, '175301' AS PRCS_YR_MO_SK, 'NA' AS MED_ALERT_ID, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 AS MED_ALERT_SK, 1 AS MBR_MED_MESRS_SK, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK ) SELECT * FROM NormalRows UNION ALL SELECT * FROM UNK UNION ALL SELECT * FROM NA_
